word: H1045 - בֵּית עַשְׁתָּרֹות - Bêyth ʻAshtârôwth - bayth ash-taw-roth' - House of Ashtaroth

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּית עשׁתּרות

Transliteration: bêyth ‛ashtârôth

Phonetic: bayth ash-taw-roth'

BDB Definition:

Beth-ashtaroth = "house of Ashtaroth"
  1. a Philistine temple

Origin: from H1004 and (H6252), Compare H1203, ..06252

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
